details.test: Task 1: Buy highest-rated Pop MP3 album under $12
Task 2: Create Morning Run playlist with mood-based short tracks
Task 3: Rent cheapest HD Rock concert video flow
Task 4: Purchase up to three tracks from different artists under $2
Task 5: Subscribe to cheapest qualifying family plan
Task 6: Add two albums by different artists (pre-order or purchase) to cart
Task 7: Apply SAVE10 to bundle and proceed to checkout
Task 8: Add recent and top-charts tracks to wishlist via discovery
Task 9: Update account preferences for genres, language, explicit filter, notifications
